titleStmt.title: SII 17.310: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 310. (A.R. No. 281 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine of the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription records the endowment of 3 kaḻañju of gold, weighed by the kuḍiñai-kal by Kañjāṟaṉ Aiyaṉ Śūṟṟi of Kañjāṟu in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam, entrusted into the hands of Taṇiyil Uttaman, Pottan Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ and Śaṅkarappāḍiyāṉ Gaṅgādhara Śeṭṭaṉ, the nagarattār of Tirukkāḷatti alias Mummuḍichōḻapuram, who undertook to supply one nāḻi of tumbai flowers daily out of the interest at one kuṉṟi per month, on the endowed amount. It also records another gift of 32 cows by the same donor for daily supply of one uḻakku of milk to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūrvatecamu
ṅ keṅkaiyuṅ kiṭāramuṅ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāta
Uṭaiyār śrī rājentiracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 23 Āva
tu ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu perumpāṇap
pāṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭṭut tirukkāḷattiyāna mumuṭicoḻapura
ttu nakarattukku Amain=ta viyāpāri taṇiyil Uttamaṉum ṭutta
pottan paḷḷikoṇṭānum caṅkarappāṭiyāṉ kaṅkātira
ceṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭa nakarattom coḻamaṇṭalattu rājen=tira
ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu kañcāṟṟuk kañcāṟaṉ Aiyyan cūṟṟiyiṭai nāṅkaḷ
koṇṭa poṉ kuṭiñaikkal niṟai poṉ mukkaḻañcu Ippoṉ mukkaḻañcu
koṇṭom koṇṭaparicāvatu yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu ḷ [3 10] mutal
kaḻañcin vāy tiṅkaḷ kuṉṟippoṉ polivatāka van=ta policaiyā
l nicatam nāḻit tumpaippūp paḷḷittāmam can=tirātitavaṟ Aṭṭu
vatāka Ipparicu Icaintu Ippoṉ koṇṭu Ippari ṭṭuvittuk kuṭuttom I
ṉṉa nakarattom yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu kaccāṟaṉ Aiyyaṉ Uṭaiyārkkup pālāṭiya ruḷa mummuṭicoḻapurattu Uṭai
(ṭai)yār maṭaviḷākattirukku manṟāṭi pācūr maṟiyan vacam viṭṭa cāvāmuvāppe Ippacu muppattiraṇṭuṅ kaikoṇṭu pacuvāṟ pāl Uḻakkāka nicata
ppāl kuṟuṇi can=tirātittava laṭṭuvatānen manṟāṭi pācūr maṟiyaten tākavum cella celuttāviṭil Ittarmmam celu
ttuvatānen ṟuman Eṟanen Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.310 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
